summary: Iteration 4 testing completed successfully. All new features (Branch Admin role, Super Admin dashboard, WhatsApp settings, role-based navigation, lead deletion permissions) are working correctly. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified.

issues: Minor React hydration warnings in console for table elements (span inside tbody) - cosmetic warning only, doesn't affect functionality - same as previous iterations

critical_code_review_comments: Branch Admin role option available in User creation dropdown (Super Admin, Branch Admin, Counsellor, Front Desk Executive)
WhatsApp Settings tab working with all 6 toggle switches (master switch, lead_added, demo_booked, demo_completed, enrollment_confirmed, payment_received, installment_reminder)
Super Admin Dashboard shows Branch Performance Overview table with totals and per-branch metrics
Role-based navigation working - Super Admin sees Admin Panel and Deleted Leads in sidebar
Lead deletion permissions correct - delete button visible for Super Admin/Branch Admin only
seed_data_creation: TEST_Branch_Admin_User created as Branch Admin role for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 4 features verified working. WhatsApp Settings API endpoints (GET/PUT /api/admin/whatsapp-settings) working correctly. Branch Admin role available in dropdown. Super Admin dashboard shows Branch Performance Overview with totals and performance badges (Outperforming/Needs Attention). Role-based navigation correctly shows/hides Admin Panel and Deleted Leads based on user role. MSG91 WhatsApp API is MOCKED (returns success but doesn't actually send messages).

mocked_apis.MSG91 WhatsApp API: send_whatsapp_message function returns success but does not actually send messages - MOCKED

features_verified.Super Admin Dashboard - Branch Performan: WORKING - Shows totals (Total Leads, Total Enrollments, Total Income, Avg Income/Branch) and branch-wise table with performance badges
features_verified.Admin Panel - Users tab - Branch Admin r: WORKING - Role dropdown shows Super Admin, Branch Admin, Counsellor, Front Desk Executive options
features_verified.Admin Panel - WhatsApp Settings tab: WORKING - Master switch + 6 individual notification toggles (lead_added, demo_booked, demo_completed, enrollment_confirmed, payment_received, installment_reminder)
features_verified.WhatsApp Settings API - PUT: WORKING - Updates individual or all settings
features_verified.Role-based navigation - Super Admin: WORKING - Sees Admin Panel and Deleted Leads in sidebar
features_verified.Lead deletion - Super Admin: WORKING - Delete button visible, soft delete with reason

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/analytics/super-admin-dashboard - Super Admin dashboard with branch performance
